questions: There are so many interesting smells in LA! Which one is your all-time favorite smell?
When you see a squirrel outside, what’s the first thought that pops into your head? Are you plotting something?
Do you prefer a really long, adventurous walk, or a short, speedy zoomie session in the yard?
Being a Shiba, you probably have strong opinions. What’s one thing humans do that you just don't understand at all?
If you could pick just one flavor of treat to eat for the rest of your life, what would it be? No limits!
What's your favorite spot to nap in the house when the sun is shining just right?
Hey there, Kylo! You look like you've got a lot going on behind those eyes. What's the very best thing that happened to you today?
